query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "planbench-xl: evaluating long-horizon planning of llm tool-use agents " computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it provides a canonical benchmark and evaluation framework for LLM tool-use agents, specifically measuring the "long-horizon" and "tool-use" mechanisms central to the user's question about extending planning evaluations.
